script_text: Words are not just in books. They live all around us!
Good readers match words with real-life things they know.
The word cozy means warm and comfortable.
What is cozy in real life?
A soft blanket. A warm fireplace. A snuggly bed.
Chilly means a little bit cold.
Early morning air. A cool breeze. An ice cube!
When you meet a new word, picture a real thing that matches it!
Now you are ready to connect words to real life!
